mapper.insert: MERGE INTO market_cart c USING DUAL ON (c.member_id = #{member_id} AND c.product_id = #{product_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET c.quantity = c.quantity + #{quantity} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (cart_id, member_id, product_id, quantity, reg_date) VALUES (SEQ_MARKET_CART.NEXTVAL, #{member_id}, #{product_id}, #{quantity}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT c.cart_id, c.member_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.reg_date, p.product_name, p.price, p.delivery_fee, p.stock, i.file_name, (p.price * c.quantity) as total_price FROM market_cart c INNER JOIN market p ON c.product_id = p.product_id LEFT OUTER JOIN product_image i ON p.product_id = i.product_id AND i.is_main = 'Y' WHERE c.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY c.cart_id DESC

SELECT c.cart_id, c.product_id, c.quantity, c.reg_date, p.product_name, p.price, p.delivery_fee, i.FILE_NAME, (p.price * c.quantity) as total_price FROM market_cart c JOIN market p ON c.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN product_image i ON p.product_id = i.product_id AND i.IS_MAIN = 'Y' WHERE c.cart_id IN (${cart_ids}) ORDER BY c.cart_id ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM market_cart WHERE cart_id IN (${cart_ids})
DELETE FROM market_cart WHERE product_id = #{product_id} AND member_id = #{member_id}
